name: New England Creamed Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the fish in foil with a small amount of butter.
2. Bake in a 350-degree oven until almost cooked (5 to 7 minutes).
3. Make the white sauce on the stovetop by melting the butter and adding the flour mixed with seasonings, stirring constantly until smooth and well blended.
4. Slowly pour in the milk while stirring constantly.
5. Bring to a boiling point and boil for 2 minutes.
6. Place the fish in a baking dish and pour over the white sauce.
7. Heat in the oven until ready to serve.
